title: pouteria sandwicensis f. densiflora
intro: Pouteria sandwicensis f. densiflora is a tree species that is native to Hawaii and is also known as the white ohia tree. The bark and roots of this tree have been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pouteria sandwicensis f. densiflora include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of this plant include making infusions from the bark and roots, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
